meta.release_notes:
# Changelog

All notable changes to this model will be documented in this file.

## [3.0.1] - 2024-10-14

### Changed

- updated descriptions and constraint inconsistencies fixed (no semantic conflicts)

## [3.0.0] - 2024-03-11

### Added

- added `capacityGroupIsInactive` as mandatory flag in aspect model header
- added `demandVolatilityParameters` as optional entity in aspect model header
- added `agreedCapacity` as optional property in capacities set

### Changed

- migrated from SAMM version `2.0.0` to `2.1.0`
- updated external references of `urn:samm:io.catenax.shared.business_partner_number`, `urn:samm:io.catenax.shared.quantity` and `urn:samm:io.catenax.shared.uuid` to version `2.0.0`

## [2.0.0] - 2023-11-07

### Added

- `linkedCapacityGroups` added as optional property in aspect model header
- added `loadFactor` as optional property in LinkedDemandSeries entity
- added `unit:secondUnitOfTime`, `unit:minuteUnitOfTime`, `unit:hourUnitOfTime` and `unit:cycle` to list of unit of measure for load information
- added `deltaProductionResult` as optional property in Capacity entity
- added `unitOfMeasureIsOmitted` as mandatory property in aspect model header

### Changed

- made `linkedDemandSeries` property optional
- made `capacities` property optional
- `unitOfMeasure` uses value list of shared aspect Quantity now. Units are now represented as reference units instead of common codes
- changed property name of `calendarWeeks` to `pointInTime`
- migrated from BAMM to SAMM namespace

### Removed

- removed `blank` value in list of `unitOfMeasure`. `unitOfMeasureIsOmitted` flag taking over the function of the `blank` value

## [1.0.1] - 2023-05-10

### Changed

- Changed description for property `changedAt`

## [1.0.0]

- initial version of the aspect model for week-based capacity groups

nodes.label: WeekBasedCapacityGroup
nodes.description: An entity made up of the weekly actual and maximum capacities for a specific customer in a given time period. A capacity group is used to compare demand and capacity data for one or several similar bundled materials in a defined unit of measure.

nodes.label: capacityGroupId
nodes.description: The Capacity Group ID uniquely identifies the capacity group within the business relationship between a supplier and its customer.

nodes.label: name
nodes.description: Name of the capacity group.

nodes.label: supplierLocations
nodes.description: Set of BPNS indicating the supplier sites that will be fulfilling the demands associated with this capacity group.

nodes.label: customer
nodes.description: The Business Partner Number (BPNL) of the party requesting materials from a supplier.

nodes.label: supplier
nodes.description: The Business Partner Number (BPNL) of the party providing materials to a customer.

nodes.label: unitOfMeasure
nodes.description: Unit of measurement for capacity quantities.

nodes.label: linkedDemandSeries
nodes.description: Set of demand series assigned to this capacity group.

nodes.label: capacities
nodes.description: A time series with week-based granularity along a given time period containing the capacity values.

nodes.label: changedAt
nodes.description: Point in time when the content (any property according to the data model) of the capacity group was changed, at the supplier, either by a human user or an automated process.

nodes.label: linkedCapacityGroups
nodes.description: A set of capacity groups linked to this capacity group.

nodes.label: unitOfMeasureIsOmitted
nodes.description: Explicit indicator of whether the unit of measure is left out of the payload intentionally. If "true" it means the sending application sends demand values without unit of measure intentionally and the unit of measure MUST NOT be contained in the payload. If "false" a unit of measure MUST be supplied.

nodes.label: materialNumberCustomer
nodes.description: Material identifier as assigned by customer. This material number identifies the material (as planned) in the customer's database.

nodes.label: materialNumberSupplier
nodes.description: Material identifier as assigned by supplier. This material number identifies the material (as planned) in the supplier's database. Used as informational field only, not for assigning demand series to capacity groups.

nodes.label: customerLocation
nodes.description: The BPNS number of the site at which the customer needs the specified material for the referenced demand series.

nodes.label: demandCategory
nodes.description: Type of demand of the referenced demand series.

nodes.label: loadFactor
nodes.description: If existent, the load factor indicates that this material of the material demand collection takes a factor more or less intensity to produce.

nodes.label: pointInTime
nodes.description: ISO Calendar Week of the given time series entry. Must be given as date of the monday in the week.

nodes.label: actualCapacity
nodes.description: The actual capacity is the realistically planned output per calendar week and material for a specific customer in a specific unit of measure, considering all positive or negative impacts on this capacity.

nodes.label: maximumCapacity
nodes.description: The supplier maximum capacity is the maximal available output per calendar week and material for a specific customer in a specific unit of measure. The maximum capacity thereby restricts the flexible capacity, as the flexible capacity is obtained from the difference of a suppliers maximum capacity minus actual capacity.

nodes.label: deltaProductionResult
nodes.description: Delta related to the aggregated material demand after pre-/post production calculation the supplier wants to send to the customer. Can be positive and negative.

nodes.label: demandCategoryCode
nodes.description: The code identifying a demand category.

nodes.label: demandCategoryName
nodes.description: The name describing a demand category.

nodes.label: CapacityGroupName
nodes.description: The name of a capacity group, used to distinguish it from other capacity groups.

nodes.label: Timestamp
nodes.description: Point in time.

nodes.label: MaterialNumber
nodes.description: The material number is a multi-character string, usually assigned by an ERP system.

nodes.label: LoadFactorCharacteristic
nodes.description: Describes the data type of the load factor.

nodes.label: PointInTimeCharacteristic
nodes.description: An ISO calendar week in which a given capacity will be provided. Must be given as date of the monday in the week.

nodes.label: DeltaProductionResultCharacteristic
nodes.description: Describes data type of a delta production result information.

nodes.label: Quantity
nodes.description: Quantity of weekly actual or maximum capacity.

nodes.label: SupplierLocationsCharacteristic
nodes.description: Contains a set of locations the supplier fulfills a demand request from.

nodes.label: LinkedDemandSeriesSet
nodes.description: A set of demand series assigned to a certain capacity group.

nodes.label: LinkedCapacityGroupsCharacteristic
nodes.description: Contains all capacity groups which are linked to the current one.

nodes.label: CapacityTimeSeries
nodes.description: The weekly actual and maximum capacities in a given time period.

nodes.label: BPNSTrait
nodes.description: Trait to ensure data format for BPNS.

nodes.label: UUIDv4IdTrait
nodes.description: Trait to ensure data format for UUIDv4.

nodes.label: LinkedDemandSeries
nodes.description: Encapsulates information used to reference a specific demand series.

nodes.label: Capacity
nodes.description: A supplier's realistically planned output per calendar week and material for a specific customer in a specific unit of measure, considering all positive or negative impacts on this capacity.

nodes.label: DemandCategoryType
nodes.description: Describes the type of a demand category.

nodes.label: DemandCategoryCharacteristic
nodes.description: The classification of demands used to prioritize or allocate capacities.

nodes.label: QuantityRange
nodes.description: Constraint to ensure a non-negative value for quantities.

nodes.label: QuantityFixedPoint
nodes.description: Constraint to ensure size of quantities: 12 digits plus 3 decimal places.

nodes.label: DemandCategoryCodeCharacteristic
nodes.description: The code identifying a demand category.
